title: EDTS VIN Configuration Resolver (NHTSA vPIC CLI + library)
summary: Implement production VIN workflow package edts-vin-resolver: validate VIN, DecodeVinValuesExtended, normalize without inventing fields, compare to registered CFGs, persist raw evidence + vehicle record + markdown report, CLI npm run vin. Outcomes are candidates only — never CONFIGURATION_CONFIRMED or geometry Verified from VIN alone. Example International VIN rejects CFG-2019-F450 reference match.
